title: Kernel Registry — Node Registration Record
description: Schema for registering a Knowledge Node in the Kernel Registry. Registration generates a root hash — the node's permanent identity.

node_number.description: Sequential registration number. Immutable after registration.

display_name.description: Human-readable display name for the node.

owner_email.description: Email of the node owner. Used in root hash generation.

seeking.description: Epistemic needs — what this node is looking for from the network.

offering.description: Confirmed outputs — what this node provides to the network.

engine_url.description: URL of the node's agent governor or execution endpoint.

governance_level.description: Governance gate intensity for this node.

gate_holder.description: Identity of the human who confirms governance gates.

root_hash.description: SHA-256 root hash. Generated at registration. Immutable. This is the node's permanent identity.

current_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the current state. Updates with each state change.

hash_chain.description: Ordered array of all state hashes. First entry is registration.

trust_state.description: Current trust level of the node's outputs.

confirmed_pct.description: Percentage of outputs that have been independently confirmed.

registered_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of registration. Used in root hash generation.

last_state_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent state change.

protocol_version.description: Version of the Kernel Registry protocol.
